title: DF101-008
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''DF101-008''' was a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that detailed the [[Yevetha]]n [[D-type fighter]]. It was appended to datafile [[DF76-882]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
